title: Senior Teacher - Testbook - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Testbook - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Testbook invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Testbook:
Testbook is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Testbook!
